_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analyze data (e.g., MOEs, MOPs) to determine mission effectiveness.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of A/B testing and experimentation design, including sample size calculation, randomization methods, guardrail metric selection, and statistical significance interpretation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-013 (AI, cosine: 0.443), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.442).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.362). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [analyze, data, determine, effectiveness, mission, moes] vs WIDAI-only terms [b, calculation, design, experimentation, guardrail, interpretation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.857, R=0.845). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.6%). "Analyze data (e.g., MOEs, MOPs) to determine mission effectiveness." and "Knowledge of A/B testing and experimentation design, including sample size calcu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.449 > STS 0.362 (gap +0.087). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [analyze, data, determine, effectiveness, mission, moes]. WIDAI terms: [b, calculation, design, experimentation, guardrail, interpretation].
